title: 10 best herbal teas for adrenal fatigue
description: Lavandula angustifolia, also known as English lavender, teas helps with adrenal fatigue because of its calming and balancing effects on the body. The herbal tea's active compounds, such as linalool and linalyl acetate, have a soothing impact on the nervous system, reducing stress and anxiety that can exacerbate adrenal fatigue. By promoting relaxation and regulating cortisol levels, Lavandula angustifolia tea can help alleviate symptoms associated with adrenal fatigue, including fatigu...
